name: Soursop
summary: It must be framed carefully because anticancer folklore claims greatly exceed evidence and safety certainty.
description: It must be framed carefully because anticancer folklore claims greatly exceed evidence and safety certainty.
contraindications: Parkinsonism or other neurodegenerative condition because soursop contains annonacin which may exacerbate neuronal degeneration with prolonged high intake
diabetes medication because soursop may have an additive blood-glucose-lowering effect and requires monitoring
blood pressure medication because soursop may have an additive blood-pressure-lowering effect
pregnancy or breastfeeding without clinician guidance due to neurotoxicity concerns and limited safety data
long-term or high-dose use of teas or extracts because cumulative annonacin exposure has been linked to atypical Parkinson's-like symptoms in epidemiological studies
